title: ProviderManifest
description: Schema for StreamPrism Provider Manifest configurations

description.description: Optional human-readable description of what this provider does

endpoint.description: Base URL endpoint of the provider's HTTP service (e.g., http://localhost:8080)

priority.description: Matching priority. Higher priority manifests are matched first. Defaults to 0.

url_patterns.description: List of regex patterns matching target URLs this provider supports

fetch_feed.description: Action details to fetch a unified feed list

resolve_stream.description: Action details to resolve a direct media stream URL

unpack_field.description: Optional JSONPath to a string field containing wrapped JSON string to unpack first

link.description: JSONPath to the feed original page link

cover_url.description: JSONPath to the feed cover/channel image URL

items_path.description: JSONPath pointing to the list of episodes/videos

pub_date.description: JSONPath to the publication date timestamp (unix epoch seconds)

duration.description: JSONPath to the duration in seconds

original_url.description: JSONPath to the episode original page URL

thumbnail_url.description: JSONPath to the episode thumbnail image URL

mode.description: Media stream delivery mode. 'redirect' for direct HTTP 302, 'proxy' for server-proxied streaming.

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers to instruct smart clients or inject during requests (e.g. Referer)

path.description: Subpath relative to the provider's endpoint (e.g., /run)

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to include in the request

payload.description: JSON payload structure. Supports {{target_url}} macro interpolation.
